item.title: Synthetic data generation for defects using TensorFlow and GANs
item.description: Comprehensive guide providing synthetic data generation for defects code snippets using TensorFlow, avoiding high-level theory to focus on practical implementations for machine vision.

item.title: Automating OpenCV industrial inspection for PCB Defect Analysis
item.description: Learn how to use OpenCV industrial inspection techniques to identify soldering defects on PCBs with contour analysis and template matching code snippets.

item.title: Building an Autoencoder Anomaly Detection Pipeline with PyTorch
item.description: Step-by-step Autoencoder anomaly detection code implementation using PyTorch for industrial surface inspection, featuring robust training loops and evaluation metrics.

item.title: Implementing YOLO for custom objects in Manufacturing Defect Detection
item.description: A practical tutorial on fine-tuning YOLO for custom objects to detect manufacturing defects, including complete code implementations and dataset preparation strategies.

item.title: Efficient Implementation of MobileNet, YOLO Object Detectionfor Image Annotation
item.description: Efficient Implementation of MobileNet, YOLO Object Detectionfor Image Annotation

item.title: Custom YOLO implementation for CPU real time face detection
item.description: Implementation details of YOLO for custom object detection on CPU.

item.title: Python for Augmented Data Generation: Building Synthetic Datasets for Machine Learning
item.description: How Python libraries help create high-quality synthetic data to improve ML models.
